description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs Rust builds using the rust:latest and rustlang/rust:nightly Docker images. Define a single build stage and include a before_script that prints the rustc and cargo versions. Add a rust-latest job in the build stage that runs cargo build --verbose with the rust:latest image. Add a rust-nightly job in the same stage, marked allow_failure, that also runs cargo build --verbose using the rustlang/rust:nightly image. No caches, artifacts, services, or conditional rules are defined.
